runTitle: Production QA - active alerts modal AI prefill
coveredSurfaces: active alert AI prefill button rendering
skippedSurfaces: unsupported alert metric read-only path (no network/filesystem firing alert in live dataset)

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before production QA; effective total 16.6220 USD and billed cost 0.0000.

artifacts.label: Active alerts modal prefill opens AI sidebar with selected alert context

completedImprovements.title: 활성 알림 모달에서 AI 사이드바 컨텍스트 자동 주입
completedImprovements.evidence: Production active alerts modal rendered AI buttons for firing CPU/Memory alerts and clicking api-was-dc1-01 CPU alert opened AI sidebar with prefilled remediation question.
completedImprovements.note: Live modal showed 3 firing alerts and all were supported CPU/Memory metrics.

notes: Verified live modal rows rendered as AI buttons: api-was-dc1-01:9100 CPU, api-was-dc1-02:9100 CPU, api-was-dc1-01:9100 Memory.
Verified clicked alert prefilled 'api-was-dc1-01:9100 서버의 CPU 사용률이 94%입니다. 현재 원인과 우선 조치 방법을 분석해줘.' in the AI sidebar input.
Unsupported metric read-only fallback was not exercised because the live firing alerts set contained only supported CPU/Memory metrics during this run.
